phases.1: Core: jobs, connector, JWT auth, Insight chat, Act proposals
phases.2: Advanced analytics: gl.period.close.readiness, AP payment discipline, treasury/VAT explainability
phases.3: RBAC v2, firm management, monitoring, multi-site, write handlers × 15
phases.4: SSO (Azure AD / Google), billing webhooks, POPIA/GDPR compliance, app store pipeline
